title: Fioria pavonioides
taxonomy: Fioria pavonioides is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. The plant belongs to the genus Fioria, which is a group of flowering plants. Fioria pavonioides is closely related to other species in the same genus, such as Fioria crassifolia. The classification of Fioria pavonioides places it within the broader category of daisy-like plants.
